summary: Track A tabular placeholder: champion regressor is sklearn MultiOutputRegressor(Ridge) on sex + age_years; mean_baseline (per_sex) retained for comparison only.

champion.implementation: sklearn.pipeline.Pipeline: ColumnTransformer(StandardScaler on age_years, OneHotEncoder on sex) + MultiOutputRegressor(Ridge(alpha=1.0))

selection.rule: Lowest test_mae_mean_cm excluding mean_baseline; ties: fewer band inversions, then newest run_id.

reproduction_note: Training and freeze are done in the main CPR codebase (not part of this results-only share). Same manifest bytes and random seed target the same split; sklearn version may change floats slightly.

artifacts.joblib_note: Trained ridge.joblib / mean_baseline.joblib exports are not included in this results-only share.

limitations: Age parsed from filename stems; verify extraction in the training data pipeline.
Future imaging-based Track A model may replace this contract for a production imaging path.
